scenario: Gallery nav pill only visible for developer/qa
action: Look at left sidebar nav pills

expected_result: Gallery pill NOT visible. [NOTE: was observed as 'always visible on single persona' in UI_user_test §Part4 — verify this bug is fixed.]

scenario: Left sidebar changes in Gallery mode
precondition: Developer persona; click Gallery nav pill
action: Left sidebar shows 'Discovery Mode' — operation controls (Import/Session) are HIDDEN (Focus Mode, ADR-038). Only gallery search/filter controls are present.

precondition: Gallery mode active; gallery_index.json populated with at least one entry
action: Navigate to the Gallery tab; wait for initial load
expected_result: Gallery shows pre-rendered PNG thumbnails from assets/gallery_data/. No Plotnine objects computed at runtime.

precondition: Gallery mode active; multiple gallery entries with different tags
action: Apply a filter/search in the Gallery
expected_result: Results update immediately (near-zero latency). [Gallery must NOT perform direct filesystem scans or YAML parsing at filter time — relies on pre-computed pivot index.]

precondition: Gallery mode; a gallery item with a YAML recipe visible
action: Click the 'transplant' / clone action on a gallery item
expected_result: YAML string is cloned into the Tier 3 active sandbox. Notification confirms. No plot rendering triggered in the Gallery itself.

scenario: Jinja2 import does not error on Gallery load
action: Click Gallery nav pill and wait for load
expected_result: NO error 'Import Jinja2 failed. DataFrame.style requires jinja2'. [NOTE: this error was observed in UI_user_test §Part4 — confirm fixed or still present.]

scenario: Gallery does NOT compute Polars/Plotnine at runtime
precondition: Gallery mode; look at app console / browser console during navigation between gallery items
expected_result: No Polars materialisation log messages appear in app console during Gallery navigation. Gallery serves static assets only.

scenario: Operation controls hidden when Gallery active
action: Look at left sidebar for Import / Session buttons
expected_result: Import and Session controls are NOT visible (Focus Mode, ADR-038). They reappear when switching to Home.
